title: glyceria nervata var. stricta
intro: Glyceria nervata var. stricta, also known as stiff sweet grass, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of stiff sweet grass include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. Stiff sweet grass can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
